ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login purposes */,
  "fullname" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was hired */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the user within the organization */,
  "teamId" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the user belongs to */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_teamId FOREIGN KEY ("teamId") REFERENCES teams ("teamId")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "teamId" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the team */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the team belongs */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager for the team */,
  "team_size" INTEGER /* Number of members in the team */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the team was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the team information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("teamId"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position's role */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department to which the position belongs */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the position was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the position information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_positions_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the access event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location from which the access occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager for the department */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the department was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the department information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the role information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user whose history is tracked */,
  "old_position" TEXT /* Previous position of the user */,
  "new_position" TEXT /* New position of the user */,
  "old_team" TEXT /* Previous team of the user */,
  "new_team" TEXT /* New team of the user */,
  "reason_for_change" TEXT /* Reason for the change in position or team */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who conducted the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "review_type" TEXT /* Type of review (e.g., annual, mid-year) */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score given in the review */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided during the review */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the review information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salary_history" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user whose salary is tracked */,
  "old_salary" REAL /* Previous salary of the user */,
  "new_salary" REAL /* New salary of the user */,
  "reason_for_change" TEXT /* Reason for the salary change */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the salary change occurred */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the salary change was recorded */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the salary history record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_postings" (
  "posting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job posting */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the position being posted */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department for the posting */,
  "posting_date" TEXT /* Date when the posting was made */,
  "closing_date" TEXT /* Date when the posting closes */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the job posting (open, closed) */,
  "job_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the job posting */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the job posting was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the job posting information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("posting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_postings_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_postings_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benefits" (
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benefit */,
  "benefit_name" TEXT /* Name of the benefit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the benefit */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the benefit was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the benefit information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_benefits" (
  "employee_benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee-benefit link */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user benefiting from the plan */,
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benefit linked to the user */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the benefit became effective for the employee */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the benefit expires for the employee */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the benefit was linked to the employee */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the benefit link information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_benefit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_benefits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_benefits_benefit_id FOREIGN KEY ("benefit_id") REFERENCES benefits ("benefit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., performance review, benefits enrollment) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the notification information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)
